study_size.description: The size of the studies (large vs. small), which is the factor examined for its effect on observed effects and P-values.

observed_effects.description: The observed effects from the studies, which tend to be closer together when studies are large and more variable when studies are small.

P_values.description: The P-values obtained from the two identical studies, which vary as a function of study size. The large discrepancy between the two values is the phenomenon being explained.
